name: Stock Sale Treated as Asset Transfer

eligibility.description: The selling corporation must own stock meeting the 80% requirements of section 1504(a)(2) in the target corporation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an election to treat the sale, exchange, or distribution of stock in a controlled subsidiary as a disposition of the subsidiary's underlying assets, avoiding gain on the stock itself.
